evidence.claim: The user has a schedule with existing slots.
evidence.fact: It assigns time windows to arriving and departing planes while ensuring no two aircraft occupy the same runway slot simultaneously.
evidence.fact_span: assigns time windows to arriving and departing planes

evidence.claim: The system detects and prevents gap violations.
evidence.fact: The system prevents gap-violating assignments on the same runway.
evidence.fact_span: prevents gap-violating assignments on the same runway

evidence.claim: The system detects and prevents slot overlaps.
evidence.fact: The system prevents gap-violating assignments on the same runway.
